goal_results.evidence: transformers.rs:286-293 defines CheckoutProcessing with order_id, tax_amount, discount_amount, duty_amount, shipping_amount, shipping_tax_amount. transformers.rs:311-322 defines CheckoutLineItem with commodity_code, unit_of_measure, unit_price, quantity, discount_amount, tax_amount, total_amount, name, reference, tax_exempt. Test gates B and C both PASS.

transformers.rs:342-346 adds customer, processing, shipping, items fields to PaymentsRequest. transformers.rs:574-616 populates them from item.router_data.l2_l3_data in the TryFrom impl, with None fallback when l2_l3_data is absent. Fields are included in the Self constructor at lines 631-634. Test gates A, D PASS; gate E FAIL is a regex mismatch (agent uses 'let request = Self{...}; Ok(request)' vs expected 'Ok(Self{...})') which is behaviorally equivalent per rubric notes.

transformers.rs:279-282 defines CheckoutCustomer with name (CustomerId) and tax_number. transformers.rs:296-307 defines CheckoutShippingAddress (country, zip) and CheckoutShipping (address, from_address_zip). Mapping at lines 577-594: customer_id -> name, customer_tax_registration_id -> tax_number, shipping_country -> country, shipping_destination_zip -> zip, shipping_origin_zip -> from_address_zip.

transformers.rs:326-347 preserves all existing PaymentsRequest fields (source, amount, currency, processing_channel_id, three_ds, return_url, capture, reference, metadata, payment_type, merchant_initiated, previous_payment_id) while adding new L2/L3 fields. Test gate F PASS (cargo check infra-skipped due to rustc version). Upstream gate p2p_upstream_payments_request_regression PASS confirms no regression.

judge_notes: Agent's patch fully implements L2/L3 payment data support for Checkout.com. All 4 goals met. The only test failure (gate E) is a regex mismatch artifact: the agent uses 'let request = Self{...}; Ok(request)' instead of 'Ok(Self{...})', which is behaviorally equivalent as noted in the rubric's decomposition_notes. Score = 0.4 + 0.4 + 0.1 + 0.1 = 1.0.
